expectations.text: Identifies the existing item RL-025 as a potential duplicate
expectations.evidence: Response explicitly references 'RL-025' and states 'Already tracked' indicating it identified the existing item as covering the same topic.

expectations.text: Mentions the existing item to the user
expectations.evidence: Response quotes the full item: 'RL-025 in .ai/roadmap.yml covers exactly this: "Screenshot loop for visual regression — Automated visual comparison of component states before/after changes."'

expectations.text: Does not create a duplicate entry
expectations.evidence: Response says 'No action needed' and does not create any new entry. No tool calls or file writes occurred.

expectations.text: Offers to update the existing item if the user wants changes
expectations.evidence: Response ends with 'Want to bump its priority or start scoping it?' — offering to modify the existing item rather than creating a new one.
